description:
Create a Harvest log in farmOS Field Kit for a wool clip. 

Details to enter:
- Log Type: Harvest
- Date: May 12, 2024
- Notes: 'Spring shearing of Romney demonstration flock. 12 ewes sheared. Fleeces skirted heavily to remove vegetable matter (VM). Wool quality is excellent with high crimp. Stored in paper sacks in the dry barn loft.'
- Quantity: 98, Unit: lbs, Label: Greasy Wool
